mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.5%, labor market deterioration signals impending economic contraction, causing investors to discount future earnings and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where UNRATE crosses 5.5%, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and stable consumer prices indicates robust consumer demand without inflationary pressure, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term fails to improve out-of-sample R-squared by at least 0.05 compared to additive models.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, which triggers short-term momentum buying and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during recovery phases, producing negative 5-day returns in >65% of triggered observations, or t-statistic for coefficient falls below 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth expands aggregate corporate profit pools, leading to sustained positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter as earnings expectations adjust upward.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are negative in >55% of periods with positive GDPC1 growth, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.03 for consecutive 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid acceleration in consumer price inflation forces expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, which compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in >60% of months where CPIAUCSL MoM exceeds 0.4%, or the signal fails to predict return direction with statistical significance (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms broad-based labor market tightening, which boosts consumer spending forecasts and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of observations, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening residential construction demand and broader credit market stress, triggering risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >65% of periods following housing starts declines, or the mechanism loses predictive accuracy during stress episodes (Rank IC < 0.02).
